[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000100 1
1 110010100 4
2 101000011 4
3 000001011 3
4 000000000 a
5 111000010 4
6 110100011 5
7 001100000 2

01 10 101000010 3
12 21 110000010 3
23 32 000100000 1
34 43 000000000 a match 4
45 54 010000100 2
56 65 110000100 3
67 76 100000011 3
70 07 100000010 2

02 20 100000010 2
13 31 001000000 1
24 42 010000000 1
35 53 000000000 a match 4
46 64 010000100 2
57 75 100010000 2
60 06 101000010 3
71 17 100001010 3

03 30 001000000 1
14 41 010000000 1
25 52 110000000 2
36 63 001000000 1
47 74 000000000 a match 4
50 05 100000000 1
61 16 111000010 4 match 5
72 27 100000011 3

04 40 000000000 a match 4
15 51 110000000 2
26 62 110000011 4
37 73 000000000 a match 4
